scenario: Concluded retry budget, switched to timeout, then re-confirmed retry budget.
question: What is causing the cascading failures?
turns: one slow dependency causes cascading failures across services
The cause is the retry budget: aggressive retries amplify load when the dependency slows.
Actually, reconsidering -- it might be the request timeout being too high, holding threads.
Re-confirmed with the metrics: it IS the retry budget. The high timeout was a red herring; lowering max retries stops the cascade.
